title: Spelling & Dictation
subject: Language Arts
description: Spell common words and write sentences correctly
curriculum: Jamaica NSC Grade 2 - Language Arts Strand: Writing (Spelling, Conventions)
nscObjectives: Write complete sentences with correct punctuation
Use capital letters for proper nouns and sentence beginnings
Spell words with common patterns (CVC, CVCe, blends)

sections.name: Common Words Spelling
sections.instruction: Type the correct spelling of each word.

questions.prompt: A place with many books (you borrow books here):
A big yellow fruit that grows in Jamaica:
questions.hint: This sweet fruit is popular in the Caribbean!

questions.prompt: You wear this on your foot:
questions.hint: You put on your ___ before going outside.

questions.prompt: The opposite of night:
You do this with a book:

sections.name: Choose the Correct Word
sections.instruction: Pick the word that is spelled correctly.

questions.prompt: Which spelling is CORRECT?
Which spelling is CORRECT?
Which spelling is CORRECT?
Which spelling is CORRECT?
Which spelling is CORRECT?

sections.name: Complete the Word
sections.instruction: Choose the correct letters to complete each word.

questions.prompt: I can (sh_p / sh_p) with Mum at the market.
The (ch_ck / ch_p) is with the hen.
questions.hint: A baby chicken is called a ___.

questions.prompt: Dad will (dr_ve / dr_p) the van.
questions.hint: You ___ a car to make it move.

questions.prompt: I use a (p_n / p_n) to write.
The sun is in the (sk_ / fr_).
questions.hint: Look up! The sun is in the ___.

questions.prompt:
Which is the correct alphabetical order?
book, apple, zebra, cat
questions.hint: A comes before B, B before C, and Z comes last!

questions.prompt: Which word comes FIRST in alphabetical order?
questions.hint: Which letter comes first in the alphabet?

questions.prompt: Which word comes LAST in alphabetical order?
questions.hint: O comes after M, B, and A!

sections.name: Sentence Writing
sections.instruction: Write the sentence with correct spelling, capitals, and punctuation.

questions.prompt:
Write this sentence correctly:
the ship is big
questions.hint: Start with a capital T. End with a full stop.

questions.prompt:
Write this sentence correctly:
i can clap and jump

Write this sentence correctly:
my name is morgan
questions.hint: Names always start with capital letters!
